en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: mupana lra na kadaw, vi’as na wari.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: mupana lra na ’unin, vi’as na wari.
en: B: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.
A: Is it going to be cold outside?
B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.
B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.
A: Will it be hot outside?
B: No, it's windy and cool.
A: How is the weather today?

ab: ’azi lritek zi ’azi vi’as na wari, salaw ’inava.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: kemuda na wari harem kana karauvan?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: iniyan za kutrem na lingatr, mupana lra na vitu’en.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: uniyan za kutrem na lingatr, mupana lra na vitu’en.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.
A: How is the weather outside?

ab: dali’ a haremay, mupana lra na kadaw, zi mupana lra na ’aliwanes.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: dali’ a haremay, mupana lra na ’unin, zi mupana lra na ’aliwanes.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.
A: How is the weather there?
B: We're going to have a big storm here.
A: How's the weather there?
B: Very well, out of the big sun.
B: Very well, out of the big sun.
A: I have to go to school.
B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.
A: I'm going out.

ab: ’a’udalr pakirev nu haremay, ikalalup murung za suku.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.
A: Is it going to rain?

ab: zemerung a haremay, uri ’a’udalr nu haremay.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.
A: Is it raining?

ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.
A: Is it raining?

ab: kamawan za ’emudalr lra, sapene’ na dalan.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: ’ema’udalr i patraran, malalup ku murung za suku.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.
A: Are you all right?

ab: salaw valiyan na vali, vatring ku tranguru’ kana vinaliyan.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.
A: Are you all right?

ab: panana na kadaw, malingatr ku tranguru’ kana kinadawan.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.

ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
